info.name: NexAsset
info.description: Centralized NexAsset API collection for Authentication, Foundation, HR, Asset Management and Enterprise Operations. Import with NexAsset Local environment and run Login first to populate AccessToken manually from the response.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Authentication flow and account administration endpoints.

request.description: Authenticates a user and returns tokens.

item.name: Foundation
item.description: Organization, branch, department and designation master-data endpoints.

request.description: Returns paged organization records with search and sorting.
Returns a single organization by id.

body.raw:

request.description: Returns paged branch records with search and sorting.
Returns a single branch by id.
Returns paged department records with search and sorting.
Returns a single department by id.
Returns paged designation records with search and sorting.
Returns a single designation by id.
Returns paged employee records with search and sorting.
Returns a single employee by id.
Returns paged role records with search and sorting.
Returns a single role by id.
Assigns a role to a user.
Returns paged permission records with search and sorting.
Returns a single permission by id.
Assigns a permission to a role.
Removes a permission from a role.
Returns permissions assigned to a role.

item.name: Asset Management
item.description: Asset category, asset lifecycle, assignment, transfer and return endpoints.

request.description: Returns paged asset category records with search and sorting.
Returns a single asset category by id.
Soft deletes a asset category record.
Returns paged asset records with search and sorting.
Returns a single asset by id.
Assigns an asset to an employee.
Returns an asset from an employee.

item.name: Enterprise Operations
item.description: Vendor, procurement, inventory, maintenance, customer, service ticket, notification, audit, setting and dashboard endpoints.

request.description: Returns paged vendor records with search and sorting.
Returns a single vendor by id.
Returns paged customer records with search and sorting.
Returns a single customer by id.
Returns paged inventory item records with search and sorting.
Returns a single inventory item by id.
Soft deletes a inventory item record.
Returns paged consumable records with search and sorting.
Returns a single consumable by id.
Creates or updates a system setting.
Returns dashboard summary metrics for an organization.
